scenarios.name: Roundtrip property test for encode/decode codec
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used fc.assert(fc.property(fc.string(), ...)) with the roundtrip identity inside Vitest, exactly the documented pattern; baseline rolled its own Math.random loop and missed fast-check's arbitraries and shrinking entirely.

scenarios.name: Pricing invariant: discount never produces negative amount
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defined a moneyArbitrary via fc.record with fc.constantFrom for currency, combined two arbitraries in fc.property, and asserted discounted.amount >= 0 per the documented example; baseline used hand-rolled Math.random without arbitraries, record types, or shrinking.
